name: GPT-2 baseline
notes: Internal reference only — untied weights (163M not 124M)

name: +RMSNorm
notes: Slight short-run regression; stability benefit at scale

name: +logit_softcap=30
notes: Three simultaneous changes: softcap (intended) + lm_head.bias=False + token_embed std 0.036→0.02 (both init fixes). Estimated true softcap delta: ~0 to +0.05 short-run convergence penalty

name: +QK-Norm
notes: Also switched MHA→GQA code path (kv=12 = n_heads so mathematically identical)

name: +SwiGLU
notes: Second strongest gain; d_ff=2048 (SwiGLU) matches params of d_ff=3072 (GELU)

name: +GQA kv=4
notes: Negligible quality cost; ~30% KV cache reduction

name: Full NanoLlama 8L
notes: Capacity regression at 500 steps recovers with longer training (NanoLlama 8L final val 3.3566)
